channel.title: Blogs on Saurabh Kale
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Saurabh Kale

item.title: The Enterprise Blueprint: Migrating Legacy Word Documentation to Docs-as-Code
item.description: A technical guide on auditing, programmatically converting, and restructuring legacy Microsoft Word archives into automated Markdown pipelines.

item.title: Building a GitHub Portfolio: A Step-by-Step Guide for Technical Writers
item.description: Why traditional PDFs don’t cut it anymore, and how to engineer a high-performance portfolio using Hugo, PaperMod, and Markdown.
